summary: Tested Play Again functionality for TeacherHubPro Educational Games. All 5 test criteria PASSED: 1) Questions are COMPLETELY DIFFERENT between sessions, 2) Session ID changes on each Play Again, 3) Questions hash changes between sessions, 4) Loading screen 'Generando nuevas preguntas...' appears, 5) Console logs show detailed session and hash tracking.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Play Again functionality is fully working. The PlayGame.js component correctly generates new session IDs, regenerates questions via API, and displays different questions on each play. Key functions: generateSessionId() (line 17), hashQuestions() (line 20), resetGame() (lines 221-312).

evidence.round1_question: María tiene un jardín cuadrado. Si cada lado mide...
evidence.round2_question: María tiene 4 filas de stickers con 4 stickers en cada fila. ¿Cuántos stickers tiene en total?
evidence.analysis: Questions changed from garden scenario to stickers scenario - completely different context and wording
Session ID changed completely with new timestamp and random suffix
Hash values are different, confirming different question content

evidence.subtitle: Preparando tu nuevo desafío
evidence.analysis: Loading screen appeared with spinner and session ID visible

evidence.regenerate_response: regenerated: true, message: New questions generated successfully

additional_observations.toast_notification: ¡Nuevas preguntas generadas! toast appears on successful regeneration
additional_observations.session_display: Session ID visible at bottom of game screen during play
additional_observations.results_screen_info: Results screen shows both Session ID and Questions Hash for verification
additional_observations.api_response: Backend regenerate-questions API returns regenerated: true with new questions
